title: polystichum platyphyllum
intro: Polystichum platyphyllum, also known as the broad-leaved polystichum, is a species of fern found in tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Polystichum platyphyllum are typically dried and made into a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
